pr.title: Add non-record unlimited-compute 11L LeakyTTT 24h local RTX 4060 Ti run

output.summary: Extends an 11-layer LeakyReLU^2 + Parallel Muon + XSA4 + Partial RoPE stack with layerwise LN scale, EMA, and legal score-first TTT training for 24h on one RTX 4060 Ti.
techniques: LeakyReLU^2 MLP and Parallel Muon with XSA4 on last layers
Partial RoPE plus layerwise LN scale and EMA regularization
Legal score-first TTT after int6 sliding-window evaluation
